name: link-to-the-flask-frontend
description: Unit tests for the 3D multiplayer D&D game engine frontend

scripts.assets:optimize:world: npx --yes @gltf-transform/cli optimize static/everything_.gltf static/everything_optimized_draco.glb --compress draco --texture-compress webp --texture-size 2048 --flatten true --instance true --join true --palette true --prune true --resample true --sparse true --weld true --simplify false
